content.title: ### {emoji.1024} Control Panel
content.description: Hey there! Pick an option below to get started.

allianceField.name: - **Alliances**
allianceField.value: - Create, edit, and track your alliances

playersField.name: - **Players**
playersField.value: - Add and manage members across your alliances

giftCodesField.name: - **Gift Codes**
giftCodesField.value: - Auto-redeem gift codes for your alliance members

notificationField.name: - **Notifications**
notificationField.value: - Schedule reminders for events or personal use

settingsField.name: - **Settings**
settingsField.value: - Customize how the bot works for you

calculatorsField.name: - **Calculators**
calculatorsField.value: - Calculate your upgrade costs, times, and resources

pluginsField.name: - **Plugins**
pluginsField.value: - Add new features with official plugins

content.title: ### {emoji.1001} Alliances
content.description: Create and manage your alliances.

createAllianceField.name: - **Create Alliance**
createAllianceField.value: - Set up a new alliance and start adding members

editAllianceField.name: - **Edit Alliance**
editAllianceField.value: - Change alliance name, channel, or refresh rate

deleteAllianceField.name: - **Delete Alliance**
deleteAllianceField.value: - Remove an alliance and all its members

manualRefreshField.name: - **Manual Refresh**
manualRefreshField.value: - Refresh player data for an alliance right now

editPriorityField.name: - **Edit Priority**
editPriorityField.value: - Reorder which alliances get processed first

viewAlliancesField.name: - **View Alliances**
viewAlliancesField.value: - See all your alliances at a glance

assignAllianceField.name: - **Assign Alliances to Admin**
assignAllianceField.value: - Give admins access to manage specific alliances

The bot has shut down. Restart it manually:
```
node starter.js
```
This is a **one-time** requirement. Future updates restart automatically.

content.title: ### {emoji.1037} Data Backup
content.description: Back up and restore your bot's data with Google Drive.

createBackupField.name: - **Create Backup**
createBackupField.value: - Set up Google Drive and create a backup. Daily auto-backups run at 00:00 UTC once setup is done.

viewBackupsField.name: - **View Backups**
viewBackupsField.value: - See your existing backups on Google Drive.

restoreBackupField.name: - **Restore Backup**
restoreBackupField.value: - Restore from a backup. A safety backup of your current data is created first.

resetOAuthField.name: - **Reset Google Drive OAuth**
resetOAuthField.value: - Reset your Google Drive connection. Use this to switch accounts or fix connection issues.

description.base: Now that you've finished the guide, click the button below to enter your Google Client ID and Secret.
description.auth:
Visit the link below and authorize the bot to access your Google Drive:
[Click Here to Authorize]({authUrl})
After authorizing, enter the code you get in the button below.
description.wait:
Creating your backup and uploading to Google Drive...
This may take a few minutes depending on data size.
description.success: Your Google Drive is connected! You can now back up your data. Hit Create Backup to make your first one.

createdField.name: - **Backup Details**

step1.title: ### Step 1: Create Google Cloud Project
step1.description:
Looks like you haven't set up Google Drive yet. To get started, you'll need a Google Cloud project.

Go to [Google Cloud Console](<https://console.cloud.google.com>) and click "Create or select a project"

step2.title: ### Step 2: Create The Project
step2.description: Click "New Project" in the top right of the popup. Name your project and click "Create". Once created, select it from the list to open the dashboard.

step3.title: ### Step 3: Enable Google Drive API
step3.description:
In the project dashboard, click "Go to APIs overview".
Click "Enable APIs and services", search for "Google Drive API", and click "Enable".

step4.title: ### Step 4: OAuth Consent Screen
step4.description:
In the left sidebar, go to "OAuth consent screen" and click "Get Started".
- Set a name for your app, select your email.
- For audience, pick 'External'.
- Set your email in Contact Information.
- Agree to Google API services user data policy, then click 'Create'.

step5.title: ### Step 5: Create OAuth client ID
step5.description:
Click "Create OAuth client", pick Desktop App as the type, and name it.
Click "Create", then copy your client ID and secret from the popup.

step6.title: ### Step 6: Audience Authorization
step6.description: Go to the audience tab and add the email you'll use for backups as a test user. This lets the bot access your Google Drive.

clientId.label: Client ID
clientId.placeholder: Enter your Google OAuth Client ID

clientSecret.label: Client Secret
clientSecret.placeholder: Enter your Google OAuth Client Secret

authCode.label: Authorization Code
authCode.description: Enter the code you got after authorizing the bot

errors.invalidCode: {emoji.1050} Invalid authorization code format. Make sure you copied the full code.
errors.stateNotFound: {emoji.1050} OAuth state not found. Start setup again.
errors.authFailed:
{emoji.1050} **Troubleshooting:**
1. Make sure the code hasn't expired (copy and submit within 10 minutes)
2. Check that your Client ID and Secret are correct
3. Try the setup process again from scratch
4. Restart the wizard by clicking 'Create Backup' again
errors.noRefreshToken: {emoji.1050} Authorization failed, no refresh token received. Try again and make sure you click "Allow" to grant access.

description.base: Here are your backups. Click the links to download.
description.wait: Fetching your backups from Google Drive...
description.noBackups: No backups yet. Hit 'Create Backup' to make your first one, or wait for auto-backups to kick in.

content.footer: Total Backups: {totalBackups} | Auto-delete keeps only 5 most recent backups

errors.setupIncomplete: {emoji.1050} OAuth setup isn't finished. Click "Create Backup" to complete authorization.

description.base:
**WARNING**: Restoring will replace all current data (except custom emojis)
Pick a backup below to restore.
description.success:
Your data has been restored from the backup.
 Safety backup saved in the Temp folder, it'll be deleted automatically after 24 hours.
description.wait:
Restoring your backup...
This may take a few minutes depending on backup size.

warningField.name: - **This will**
warningField.value:
- Create a safety backup of your current data
  - Replace all current data with the selected backup (except custom emojis)
  - This can't be undone! Make sure you have a recent backup before proceeding.

restartingField.name: - **Bot is restarting**
restartingField.value: - Wait a moment for it to come back online.

content.downloading:
{emoji.1030} Downloading backup and preparing to restore...
This may take a few minutes depending on backup size.
content.restoring:
{emoji.1030} Restoring backup...
This may take a few minutes depending on backup size.

content.description:
This will erase your current Google Drive connection.
You'll need to set it up again by clicking 'Create Backup'.
content.success: Click 'Create Backup' to set up again.

content.title: ### {emoji.1039} Custom Emoji Management
content.description: Customize the bot's emojis with your own packs.

addPackField.name: - **Create Pack**
addPackField.value: - Create a new custom emoji pack

editPackField.name: - **Edit Pack**
editPackField.value: - Change emojis in an existing pack

viewPackField.name: - **View Pack**
viewPackField.value: - See all emojis in a pack

reloadDefaultsField.name: - **Restore**
reloadDefaultsField.value: - Redownload and fix the default emoji pack

activatePackField.name: - **Activate Pack**
activatePackField.value: - Set which emoji pack the bot uses

shareField.name: - **Share Pack**
shareField.value: - Share your emoji packs with others

uploadField.name: - **Upload Pack**
uploadField.value: - Import an emoji pack someone shared with you

content.description: Pick a pack to see all its emojis.

description.main: Are you sure you want to delete this pack?
description.confirm: This can't be undone! Confirm you want to delete **{packName}**.

errors.noPacks: {emoji.1050} No custom emoji packs found. Create one first!

emojiInput.label: URL / Emoji
emojiInput.description: type \ before custom emojis and copy the resulting text (e.g., `<:emojiName:emojiId>`).

fileInput.label: Or Upload Image

description.main:
Activating emoji pack: {packName}
- Global
  - Sets the selected pack as active for all admins without a personal selection.
- Personal
  - Sets the selected pack as active for you only.
description.globalActivated: {emoji.1004} {packName} is now the globally active emoji pack!
description.personalActivated: {emoji.1004} {packName} is now your personally active emoji pack!

content.title: ### {emoji.1033} Reloading Default Pack
content.description: Restoring the default emoji pack. This will redownload the original emojis and fix any issues.

description.base: Control who can use specific features by restricting them to admins, certain channels, or disabling them entirely.
description.selectAccess:
- Everyone
  - All users can use the feature
- Admins Only
  - Only admins can use it
- Specific Channel
  - Restricted to whitelisted channels
- Disable
  - Disabled for everyone except the bot owner
description.chooseChannelsToAdd: Pick channels to add to the whitelist
description.chooseChannelsToRemove: Pick channels to remove from the whitelist
description.channelsRemoved:
These channels were removed from the whitelist:
{channelsList}
description.channelsAdded:
These channels were added to the whitelist:
{channelsList}
description.chooseAction:
- Pick an action for whitelisted channels:
  - Add: Add more channels
  - Remove: Remove channels
description.everyone: Changing private notifications access to **Everyone** lets all users create private notifications.
description.admins:
Changing to **Admins Only** will:
- Disable all private notifications from non-admin users
- Only the owner and admins can create new ones
description.channel:
Changing to **Specific Channel** will:
- Disable all private notifications from non-owner users
- Only the owner can create private notifications

**Note:** This doesn't apply to DM notifications since they have no channel context.
description.disable:
Changing to **Disable** will:
- Disable all private notifications from non-owner users
- Only the owner can manage notifications

errors.noWhitelistedChannels: No whitelisted channels for this server. Add channels to the whitelist first.
errors.notServer: {emoji.1050} This feature only works on a server.

content.title: ### {emoji.1039} Support
content.description:
Need help or running into issues? Ask on our [Discord](https://discord.gg/A7ZVTFd4p9), or hit "Generate Report" if you're seeing errors.
For emotional and financial support, you can buy me a coffee here: [Buy Me A Coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/wosland) {emoji.1039}
